arts.ttl: ‘Sale disguised as a loan’ – Everton to pay close to £16m for signing, money back for club
arts.sum: Everton will pay close to $20m (£16m) to sign Charly Alcaraz on a permanent basis from Flamengo at the end of his loan deal. That’s according to journalist Venê Casagrande, who covers the midfielder’s impending move to Everton today. arts.ttl: ‘Controversial negotiation’ sends player to Everton – Agent kept in dark, manager chat crucial for Toffees
arts.sum: Charly Alcaraz was unaware of Everton’s negotiations with Flamengo for him and had initially intended to stay with the Brazilian club. That’s according to UOL and journalist Raisa Simplicio, who both report on the matter today and the fact Alcaraz had not intended to return to England. arts.ttl: Four Leicester City players with uncertain futures ahead of transfer deadline day
arts.sum: After making his Premier League debut at the end of September, Alves had suggested he wanted a loan spell away from City to get a regular run of senior minutes. The winter window is in its final few days and Leicester City are still working to bring in new signings to boost the club’s Premier League survival hopes.
